title: Neurofeedback for ADHD: a meta-analysis
abstract: We analyzed 20 RCTs of neurofeedback training in adults with ADHD.

title: tDCS for generalized anxiety disorder
abstract: Prefrontal tDCS reduced anxiety symptoms in 12 subjects over 4 weeks.

title: SMR neurofeedback in treatment-resistant depression
abstract: SMR protocol showed promise in a pilot cohort of TRD patients.

title: qEEG markers of insomnia
abstract: Elevated beta and reduced SMR were observed in insomnia patients.
